/usr/bin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/sage.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/c/main.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/c/ast.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/c/codegen.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/c/compiler.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/c/constfold.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/c/dce.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/c/env.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/c/formatter.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/c/gc.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/c/inline.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/c/interpreter.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/c/linter.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/c/lexer.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/c/llvm_backend.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/c/lsp.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/c/module.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/c/net.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/c/parser.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/c/pass.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/c/sage_thread.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/c/stdlib.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/c/typecheck.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/c/value.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/c/heartbeat.c.o -o sage  -lm -ldl -lpthread -lcurl -lssl -lcrypto
